name: Gortex: Smart Context on Prompt
description: On each new prompt, calls smart_context to assemble task-relevant code context from the knowledge graph in one shot.

then.prompt: If the user's message describes a coding task (adding a feature, fixing a bug, refactoring, understanding code), call Gortex's smart_context tool with the task description to get relevant symbols, source code, relationships, and an edit plan in one call. Skip this for non-coding questions or simple chat.
